attributes.name: [MySQL OTel] High buffer pool dirty page ratio

esqlQuery.esql:
FROM metrics-mysqlreceiver.otel-*
// Buffer pool usage (bytes) by status: clean vs dirty; gauges
| WHERE metrics.mysql.buffer_pool.usage IS NOT NULL
    AND attributes.status IN ("dirty", "clean")
| STATS
    dirty = MAX(metrics.mysql.buffer_pool.usage) WHERE attributes.status == "dirty",
    clean = MAX(metrics.mysql.buffer_pool.usage) WHERE attributes.status == "clean"
  BY resource.attributes.mysql.instance.endpoint
| EVAL total = dirty + clean, ratio = CASE(total > 0, dirty / total, 0)
// Alert when dirty ratio > 75%; InnoDB will flush aggressively above this
| WHERE ratio > 0.75 AND total > 0
| SORT ratio DESC
